title: BackPort Recipes
description: BackPort new recipes to older versions of minecraft | Lodestone, Lead, Nametag, Saddle, Snapshot 25w02a backport
body:
⭐ **Backport Recipes – Craft Modern Items in Older Minecraft Versions!**

![Saddle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25122143e5eb92c136196c9b20132a83a44f3471.png)
![lodestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1435bbd335264a4f61de0ebaab0611caedd2e125_0.webp)
![nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f4cdb348eec0013999f4f8b8fa747295de1faba.png)
![lead](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27661d828f2f1c1822a79b5f1d0b92d1de10cc4e.png)
![bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/062602b8915cc9afc567b0e95b109d58fec6c357.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

Backport Recipes brings several newer Minecraft crafting recipes into older game versions, allowing you to obtain items that were previously uncraftable or used outdated materials. Perfect for survival players, modpacks, and servers that want more progression without breaking vanilla balance.

🛠️ Included Backport Recipes
This mod adds crafting recipes for items that originally had no recipe or were updated in newer versions:

✔ Bundle
Craft the early-game inventory helper using a balanced, survival-friendly recipe.

✔ Saddle
Finally craft saddles without relying on dungeon loot or fishing.

✔ Name Tag
Create name tags in survival to tag mobs without searching structures.

✔ Lead (Leash)
Adds the new lead recipe used in recent snapshots/versions.

✔ Lodestone
Uses the modern lodestone recipe—no netherite required in older versions.

![backport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7322ef70f0b7dd26323d7bedec3b782beb0da1.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![lodestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d931c15af65cdbf9d6c73a68f1f23f733ed129a1.png)
![lead](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a260e3c6e8137ab52fc456587e3889f35e0fa5f2.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
